title: picris sonchoides var. monticola
intro: Picris sonchoides var. monticola, commonly known as Alpine Hawk's Beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Alpine Hawk's Beard is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing due to its rich content of flavonoids and terpenoids. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
